Opportunity.Definition: Incidents virtually removed and no injuries occur
Incidents virtually removed and no injuries occur
Only minor incidents with no serious medical treatment required

Opportunity.Definition: Exceptional improvements to quality. Exceptional works / scope improvements.
Exceptional improvements to quality. Exceptional works / scope improvements.
Major improvements to quality. Major works / scope improvements.
Significant improvements to quality. Significant work / scope improvements.
Noticeable improvements to quality. Minor work / scope improvements.
Negligible improvements to quality. Barely noticeable impact.

Threat.Definition: Quality is meeting the requirements at an acceptable level. Barely noticeable impact.
Quality is not meeting the requirements but can be easily recovered. Minor works / scope deviation or reduction.
Quality is not meeting the requirements but can be reworked and or recovered to acceptable quality requirements. Considerable works / scope deviation or reduction.
Quality is not meeting the requirements or standards but can be reworked and/or recovered to acceptable level of degradation. Major works / scope deviation or reduction.

Quality is not meeting the requirements and standards and must be reworked and or replaced. Unacceptable impacts with no possibility of exception. Project work or element does not meet need and purpose.

Quality is not meeting the requirements and standards and must be reworked and or replaced. Unacceptable impacts with no possibility of exception. Project work or element does not meet need and purpose.

Opportunity.Definition: Major long-term enhancements to the natural and social environments, preservation of biological diversity, or preservation of the present and future historical, archaeological and natural heritage. The potential significance of the outcomes are of national to international importance

Major long-term enhancements to the natural and social environments, preservation of biological diversity, or preservation of the present and future historical, archaeological and natural heritage. The potential significance of the outcomes are of national to international importance
Major environmental enhancement or preservation initiatives of medium to long term duration. The potential environmental significance of the outcomes are of regional to national importance
Moderate environmental enhancements or preservation. The potential environmental significance of the outcomes are of local to regional importance
Minor area specific to localized environmental enhancements or preservation (short term). The potential environmental significance of the outcomes are of area specific to local importance
Slight, localized and temporary enhancements to the environment

Serious breach of regulations with investigation and report to authorities, fine possible

Significant prosecution and fines. Serious litigation. Class actions
